---
title: "DL Framework"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Building a compact PyTorch-style deep learning framework to understand tensors,
autograd, modules, dispatch, and native performance paths.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add Python Tensor Library GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Python Tensor Library</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Tensor object, broadcasting, indexing, reductions, and NumPy-backed operations</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Autograd Engine GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Autograd Engine</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Dynamic computation graph, reverse-mode differentiation, and gradient checks</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Neural Network Modules GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Neural Network Modules</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Parameter management, layers, losses, optimizers, and training loops</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add C++ Backend GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">C++ Backend</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Native tensor kernels, Python bindings, memory layout, and extension interfaces</span>
  </a>
</div>
